benchmark.primary_return: daily net portfolio return on 10M NAV

bootstrap.fold_resampling: per-fold, that fold daily-return series is block-bootstrapped identically (same L/resamples/seed)
bootstrap.name: moving-block (non-circular) bootstrap of daily net returns
bootstrap.partition: resample the eligible daily net return series by drawing blocks of fixed length L from random start indices in [0,n-1], truncating blocks at the series end (no wraparound), concatenating drawn blocks in draw order, then truncating to exactly n observations
bootstrap.reference_implementation: docs/review/mr002/evaluator_prototype/mr002_valoos_metrics_prototype.py (synthetic-qualified primitive; the qualified evaluator binds the frozen impl)

boundary: Validation/OOS SEALED AND UNREAD; performance interpretation + production promotion NOT AUTHORIZED.

confirmatory_structure.oos_role: absolute economic/statistical gates, config B, once

cost_model_frozen_values.executable_artifact: PREREQUISITE (evaluator qualification binds file+blob+sha256+version+commit+tree+container+lock+synthetic evidence; not a placeholder value)

coverage_gates.denominators: per-window: numerator = observed complete records; denominator = eligible sessions x registered universe cardinality x required fields. Registered full-population denominator = 40,750 ticker-days (sealed manifest). Window-specific ticker-day denominators computed by the evaluator from the FROZEN universe table (metadata) at qualification - a prerequisite, not a placeholder value.

dsr.skew_kurtosis: sample skewness and kurtosis of the config-B net return series
dsr.spec_status: PREREQUISITE - exact estimator + numerical tolerances bound in evaluator qualification
dsr.trials_definition: the three configurations A,B,C tried (B is the verdict config; A/C are the tried alternatives inflating multiple-testing variance)

gates_frozen.capacity: positive net edge under 2% ADV cap

diversifier_tag.note: reported tag DIVERSIFIER_TIER_MET only; NOT a PASS route

gates_frozen.parameter_stability: configs A and C both net-profitable

pbo.matrix: config-B per-fold performance across the 5 validation folds; symmetric IS/OOS partitions
pbo.spec_status: PREREQUISITE - exact split count S, ranking metric, and partition enumeration bound in evaluator qualification with synthetic fixtures
pbo.trials_family: the config-B fold performance matrix; A and C are NOT PBO trials (they are the parameter-stability gate)

record_status: RELEASE_CANDIDATE (promotes to v1.0-final on owner ratification of the realization-endpoint convention)

sealed_access_protocol.first_access_proof: earliest CloudTrail GetObject event on the validation partition
sealed_access_protocol.mechanism: CloudTrail S3 data events enabled BEFORE access; dedicated IAM principal; explicit bucket/key DENY on the OOS partition during validation; validation-only access policy during validation; committed CloudTrail event export; policy-state snapshots before and after each execution
sealed_access_protocol.oos_unread_proof: access-policy isolation + audited ABSENCE of OOS GetObject events during validation (NOT an S3 last-access attribute, which S3 does not provide)

seam_rule.eligibility: score decision session t only if all formation sessions AND full realization horizon lie within the SAME governed window
seam_rule.fold_rule: 5 contiguous non-overlapping nearly-equal partitions of the eligible validation sessions; remainder to earliest folds (here exactly 155 each, 775/5)

secondary_family: descriptive_only (no inferential secondary family; no post-hoc multiplicity)

test_status.full_validation_oos_evaluator: NOT YET BUILT OR QUALIFIED (Workstream B)
test_status.metric_primitives_prototype: EXECUTED - 11/11 synthetic tests passed (reads no data)
